channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What we know about hantavirus cases tied to deadly cruise ship outbreak
item.description: Health officials have identified at least eight confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus tied to an outbreak on the M/V Hondius cruise ship.

item.title: U.S. launches "self-defense strikes" on Iran, says warships came under fire
item.description: As President Trump again voiced optimism that Iran will "make a deal" to end the war, Tehran declared itself the regulator of Strait of Hormuz shippin...

item.title: Apparent bear attack kills missing hiker in Montana's Glacier National Park
item.description: The body of a missing hiker killed in an apparent bear attack has been found in Glacier National Park in Montana, park officials say.

item.title: WATCH: Sir David Attenborough turns 100
item.description: ABC News' Danny New celebrates the career of the legendary conservationist and broadcaster.
